title: Kiosk schema descriptor
description: The value of the kind:"value" envelope returned by GET /kiosk/schema.

verbs.description: The invariant four verbs (query, run, pay, schema), always all present -- the protocol surface itself, NOT the served subset. The served subset is `capabilities` in /.well-known/kiosk.json.

params.description: Free-form provider-defined hint object (by convention name -> type-hint string), or null. Documentation, not a validation contract.
